description: List sources, optionally filtered by notebook (GET /api/sources).
rules: read-only: only GETs from the server
NOTEBOOK_ID optional — omit to list across all notebooks
writes the source list JSON to record_store/sources.json
degrades gracefully (status=unreachable, exit 0) when the server is down
usage: Set OPEN_NOTEBOOK_URL (NOTEBOOK_ID optional filter, SOURCE_LIMIT default 20). Output: sources.json.
limitation: Requires a reachable Open Notebook server with the requests package.
